text:
Śukr, the native will be afflicted by
white leprosy. If receiving a Drishti from Mangal, the native will have blood
and bilious disorders and, if receiving a Drishti from Ketu, the native will
th th
suffer from black leprosy. Should Rahu and Mangal be in the 4 , or 5 from
Karakāńś, the native will suffer from pulmonary consumption and, if
th th
simultaneously there happens to be Candr‟s Drishti on the 4 , or the 5 ,
th th
this affliction will be certain. Mangal alone in the 4 , or the 5 will cause
th th
ulcers. If Ketu is in the 4 , or the 5 , one will suffer from dysentery and
afflictions, due to (impure) water. Rahu and Gulik will make one a doctor,
curing poisonous afflictions, or will cause troubles through poison. Should
th th
Śani be alone in the 4 , or 5 , the native will be skillful in archery. Ketu
th th
lonely placed in the 4 , or the 5 will make one a maker of watches etc.
th th
